output.summary: Revision 11 QA pass. FQA-005 verified FIXED via live browser testing. The global *:focus-visible rule in body.css was moved into @layer base, allowing Tailwind utility classes to override it. All three revision 10 fixes now confirmed passing. All previous regression checks from revisions 9 and 10 continue to pass. No open issues remain.

body_css_focus_visible.note: Previously unlayered (lines 38-40), now correctly inside @layer base so Tailwind @layer utilities can override it.

FQA005_outlineFixOnNavButton.method: 6x Tab keypresses from document.body to reach first .header-main-item-button
FQA005_outlineFixOnNavButton.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-150655: hasMenuItemBtn=true, focusVisible=true, outline-style=solid, outline-color=rgb(255,255,255), outline-width=2px, outline-offset=2px, color=rgb(212,255,69). White solid outline visually confirmed around ABOUT button in rendered header.
FQA005_outlineFixOnNavButton.wasFailingBefore: outline-style was dotted, outline-color was rgb(31,31,29) in revision 10

FQA005_outlineFixOnSubItem.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-150721: focusVisible=true, outline-style=solid, outline-color=rgb(255,255,255), outline-width=2px, outline-offset=2px, color=rgb(212,255,69). White solid outline visually confirmed around WHO WE ARE in dropdown.

fix1_focusVisibleTextAccent.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-150655: color=rgb(212,255,69) on .header-main-item-button with focusVisible=true. Accent color correctly applied. Screenshot 2026-02-18-150721: same accent color on sub-item link.

globalDefaultStillWorks.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-150616 (taken before fix confirmation): a non-header BUTTON element (hasMenuItemBtn=false, no outline-solid override classes) with focusVisible=true shows outline-style=dotted, outline-color=rgb(31,31,29). The @layer base default still applies to elements without explicit overrides.

FQA001_arrowDownIntoDropdown.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-150741: TAG=A, text=Who We Are, aria-expanded=n/a. Focus correctly enters first dropdown item via ArrowDown.

FQA002_arrowUpIntoDropdown.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-150744: TAG=A, text=Work at Ignite, aria-expanded=n/a. Focus correctly enters last dropdown item via ArrowUp.

escape_closesDropdown.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-150802: focus=About, btn aria-expanded=false, submenu hidden=true. Escape from inside dropdown closes it and returns focus to trigger. White solid outline visible on ABOUT button.

CUSTOM011_tabClosesDropdown.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-150808: focus=Health, btn aria-expanded=false, submenu hidden=true. Tab from inside dropdown closes submenu and moves focus to next top-level item. White solid outline visible on HEALTH button.

FQA003_ariaLabelOnMenubar.note: Unchanged since revision 9. Verified in code review of HeaderMain.php line 150.

FQA004_ariaOrientationOnMenubar.note: Unchanged since revision 9. Verified in code review of HeaderMain.php line 150.

fix3_minWidthMax_removed.note: Unchanged since revision 10. Submenu has min-width=calc(100%+48px), no min-w-max class.

issuesSummary.FQA-001: CLOSED — Fixed revision 9, regression confirmed passing
issuesSummary.FQA-002: CLOSED — Fixed revision 9, regression confirmed passing
issuesSummary.FQA-003: CLOSED — Fixed revision 9, regression confirmed passing
issuesSummary.FQA-004: CLOSED — Fixed revision 9, regression confirmed passing
issuesSummary.FQA-005: CLOSED — Fixed revision 11. body.css *:focus-visible moved into @layer base. Live browser confirms outline-style=solid, outline-color=rgb(255,255,255) on all header interactive elements with keyboard focus.
